worktree.setup:
cp \"$PASEO_SOURCE_CHECKOUT_PATH/.env\" .env
mkdir -p public && printf '{"apiUrl": ""}\n' > public/config.json
pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

branchName.instructions:
Do not use forward/backward slash in branch name (will break ci)

use <prefix>-<issuenumber>-name
example: feat-862-hunting-trails

commitMessage.instructions: Use conventional commits with scope. Use fix only if the bug was present in a previous release / found by a customer, otherwise use `chore` prefix and fix in the message.
